allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\gokca" -Depth 3 -Filter "Google" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName, PSIsContainer | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer -eq $true })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\gokca\\OneDrive" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---"; $onedrivePath = \(Get-ItemProperty -Path "HKCU:\\Software\\Microsoft\\OneDrive\\Accounts\\Personal" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).UserFolder; Write-Host "OneDrive Personal: $onedrivePath")
PowerShell(foreach \($drive in @\("D","E","F","G"\)\) { Write-Host "=== Drive $drive ==="; Get-ChildItem "${drive}:\\" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Name })
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\gokca\\OneDrive" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object Name, Attributes | Sort-Object Name)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "C:\\Users\\gokca\\OneDrive\\Kişisel Kasa" -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "ExitCode: $LASTEXITCODE")
